summary: Hand-cluster the 88 concepts into proper two-tier families per design.md §4 starting hierarchy (22 families across 6 domains). Edit concepts/taxonomy.toml, re-run scripts/sync_taxonomy.py --apply. Membership table updates via ON CONFLICT clause; no other table touched. Revisit the §4 known-judgment-calls (wu_wei, transformative_path, ecstatic_modes, numerical_mysticism, forbidden_knowledge) during the pass. Per design.md §13 step 6.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content:
Revisit two ex-orphan placements during the clustering pass (placed in commit 8fcfa4d, backfilled live):

(1) emotional_epistemology — currently soteriology (mirror); §4 target knowledge_path. Stretches knowledge_path's 'salvific knowing' gloss: it is the doctrine that emotion is a valid MODE OF KNOWING reality (Ouspensky, Tertium Organum) — an epistemic-faculty claim more than a salvation path. Candidates: a new 'modes of knowing / supra-rational epistemology' family (possibly shared with cosmic_consciousness, whose new-family question operator also parked), or anthropology as a human faculty.

(2) prophetic_rejection — currently ethics (mirror); §4 target moral_teaching. Weakest fit of the seven: a reception/pedagogy motif (the prophet rejected by his own; Gospel of Thomas logion), sits only loosely with rejection_of_hypocrisy / paradox_as_teaching. Candidates: keep in ethics as a teaching-reception motif, give it its own home, or soteriology.

Both kept as-placed for now per operator decision; flagged so clustering reconsiders them alongside the §4 known-judgment-calls (wu_wei, transformative_path, ecstatic_modes, numerical_mysticism, forbidden_knowledge).
